Notice Of Motion For Sanctions Under Cal Code Civ Proc 128.7 Memorandum Of Points And Authorities Declaration Of Barry Schneider
Off Calendar Nov-20-2017 Denied
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Irwin Schwartz, Esq. of BLA Schwartz PC, Tel. 408.796.1570, for defendants and moving party;
Gilbert Serota, Esq. of Arnold & Porter, Tel. 415.471.3170, for plaintiff and opposing party.

RULING: The matter was argued. At the conclusion of arguments, the Court adopted its tentative ruling with modifications as stated on the record. DEFENDANTS BARRY SCHNEIDER, BLAKE SCHNEIDER's Motion For Sanctions under CCP 128.7 is denied and plaintiff Ronnie Barnes' request for fees and costs in opposing the motion in the amount of $36,807 is granted. Payment is due within 30 days of notice of entry of the order. Order signed. [See signed order for details of the court's ruling.] Judge: Harold E. Kahn; Clerk: G. Gonzales; Reporter: Reyes F. Hunter, CSR#6576, e-mail: rhunter@sftc.org.

Notice Of Hearing On Defendants Motion To Compel Arbitration And To Stay Memorandum Of Points And Authorities Declaration Of Barry Schneider
Off Calendar Nov-20-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Irwin Schwartz, Esq. of BLA Schwartz PC, Tel. 408.796.1570, for defendants and moving party;
Gilbert Serota, Esq. of Arnold & Porter, Tel. 415.471.3170, for plaintiff and opposing party.

RULING: The matter was argued. At the conclusion of arguments, the Court adopted its tentative ruling on DEFENDANT BARRY SCHNEIDER, BLAKE SCHNEIDER's MOTION TO CMOPEL ARBITRATION AND TO STAY, with modifications as stated on the record. Defendants Barry and Blake Schneider's motion to compel arbitration and to stay is GRANTED. [Refer to the Court's tentative ruling.] Counsel for the Schneiders is required to prepare and submit a proposed order which repeats verbatim the court's ruling and complies with CRC 3.1312. Judge: Harold E. Kahn; Clerk: G. Gonzales; Reporter: Reyes F. Hunter, CSR#6576, e-mail: rhunter@sftc.org.

Notice Of Motion For Sanctions Under Cal Code Civ Proc 128.7 Memorandum Of Points And Authorities Declaration Of Barry Schneider
Off Calendar Oct-19-2017 Continued To Nov-15-17 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Gilbert Serota, Esq. (415-471-3170) of Arnold Porter Kaye Scholer for Plaintiff.
Irwin Schwartz, Esq. (213-785-3854) of BLA Schwartz for Defendant BARRY SCHNEIDER, BLAKE SCHNEIDER.

RULING - A R G U E D. The Court announces the tentative ruling. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

DEFENDANT BARRY SCHNEIDER, BLAKE SCHNEIDER's Motion For Sanctions Under Cal Code Civ Proc 128.7 is continued to November 15, 2017 at 9:30 am in Dept. 302 for further briefing limited to 3 issues as stated on the record on the Motion to compel Arbitration and to stay. Supplemental brief - 10/26/17, supplemental opposition - 11/3/17, supplemental reply - 11/8/17, courtesy copies no later tham 11/8/17. (as fully reported in the reporter's transcript)

Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Lewis Gillian , CSR No:12355 , email: lgillian@sftc.org. (D302)

MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Gilbert Serota, Esq. (415-471-3170) of Arnold Porter Kaye Scholer for Plaintiff.
Irwin Schwartz, Esq. (213-785-3854) of BLA Schwartz for Defendant BARRY SCHNEIDER, BLAKE SCHNEIDER.

RULING - A R G U E D. The Court announces the tentative ruling. Plaintiff raises two issues. Defendant argues exhibit A. (as fully reported in the reporter's notes) The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

DEFENDANT BARRY SCHNEIDER, BLAKE SCHNEIDER's Hearing On Defendants Motion To Compel Arbitration And To Stay is continued to November 15, 2017 at 9:30 am in Dept. 302 for further briefing limited to 3 issues as stated on the record.
